title: Minecraft Revamped
description: This mod will slowly be adding more and more stuff to vanilla Minecraft, DM me on  discord to suggest something!
body:
Introducing Minecraft Revamped, a dynamic project spearheaded by the creative mind @Morbious133 on YouTube. Our primary mission is to inject new life into the enchantingly simple yet occasionally monotonous vanilla Minecraft experience. Expect periodic updates as we tirelessly work to enhance and expand the game.

We welcome your input and ideas to make this journey even more exciting! If you have a brilliant concept you'd love to see come to life, reach out to us via direct message on Twitter or Discord. Your contributions could be the next innovative addition to Minecraft Revamped. Join us on this transformative adventure, where every idea has the potential to shape the future of Minecraft gameplay!


<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

**Update 1.1 Features:**

- New mob called the "Spec Slime"
- Raw and Smelted Slimederite ore
- New dimension called the "Slimyverse" wich is all about slimes
- New Archivements
- New Slimy Blocks and Fluids
- New Slimy Biomes that generate in the Slimyverse
- New food called "Slimy Cake"
- And crafting Recipes for some of the blocks!

**Update 1.2 Features:**

- All of the Above
- Adds tons of new Food (Sausages, Pizza, Noodles etc.)
- Adds 2 new Paintings
- Adds new Pancake Block, Pancake Water and Pancake Dimension

**Update 1.3 Features:**

- All of the Above
- New Potion
- New Void Dimension that Can't be accessed whit a portal
- New Void Block and Fluid
- New Copper Pickaxe that Can't currently be crafted
- New Painting

</details>

<details>
<summary>Addons</summary>

### Official
[Revamped Textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/revamped-textures)
(Revamped Textures is Still Under Review)

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>Known Compatibility Issues</summary>

None for now!

</details>
